body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Makes secant method default root solver method for accelerated convergence. This now passes convergence tests (e.g., ~1% accuracy for fluxes with maxiter = 7).

Convergence can fail for very stable cases, where Businger profiles do not have a solution for Ri_b > 0.21. This PR just clamps the stability parameter to reasonable values in those cases; the convergence flag can returned failed convergence in those cases, but the fluxes are still accurate (and small).

title: Accelerated convergence with secant method
